items.name: Active 5V Buzzer 3kHz
items.notes: Opencircuit, SKU #106611. Active buzzer, 5V, 3kHz. Original anti-static bag.

items.name: IR Infrared Receiver Sensor (VS1838 / KY-1838)
items.notes: Opencircuit, SKU #10295. 38kHz IR receiver module. Original anti-static bag.

items.name: Tactile Push Button 6x6x8mm
items.notes: Opencircuit, SKU #10426. Momentary tactile pushbutton, 6x6x8mm. Pack of 25 per label (form sent 1).

items.name: Metal Film Resistor 33Ω 1/4W (value unconfirmed)
items.notes: Opencircuit, SKU #54971. 1/4W metal film, axial, blue body (confirmed by close-up). Sold as pack of 10; user has 5. VALUE STILL UNCONFIRMED — color bands not legible in the close-up (shot from too far); best guess 33ohm from the label. Need a tight macro of ONE resistor (fill the frame) or the value.

items.name: 9g Micro Servo (Cytron T-8090)
items.notes: Cytron Technologies T-8090, 9GR micro servo (~9g). Comes with servo horns. Barcode 3051843.

items.name: IR Receiver + Remote Control Kit
items.notes: Opencircuit, SKU #10028. Kit: IR receiver module (VS1838-type, with header pins) + multi-button IR remote control. Sealed anti-static bag. Distinct from the standalone IR receiver #10295.

items.name: Electrolytic Capacitor 1000µF 16V
items.notes: Opencircuit, SKU #53515. Radial electrolytic, 1000uF 16V. Pack of 25 per label (set from label; was 1).

items.name: MT3608 DC-DC Step-Up Boost Converter
items.notes: MT3608 adjustable boost converter module (~2A). Inputs VIN+/VIN-, outputs VOUT+/VOUT-, trim-pot to set output voltage. No package/label captured; quantity left as entered.

items.name: 4x4 Matrix Keypad (16-button)
items.notes: 16-key 4x4 matrix keypad / button board on green PCB with header pins. No package label captured; quantity left as entered.

items.name: DS1302 Real-Time Clock (RTC) Module
items.notes: DS1302 RTC module, green PCB with CR2032 coin-cell holder + battery and header pins. No package label captured; quantity left as entered.

items.name: 16x2 Character LCD (1602A)
items.notes: 1602A Ver2.0, HD44780-compatible 16x2 character LCD (blue), 16-pin header. No package label captured; quantity left as entered.

items.name: 608zz bearings
items.notes: Cytron-sourced, ~10 pcs per label. Part looks like a stack of white translucent rings/spacers; the product name on the bag is not legible in the photos. NEEDS ID — tell me what it is, or add a sharp close-up of the label and I will read it.

items.name: Ceramic Capacitor 100nF (0.1µF)
items.notes: Opencircuit, SKU #10349. 100nF (0.1uF) multilayer ceramic capacitor. Pack of 50 per label (set from label).

items.name: Stainless Steel Screws & Washers (fastener set)
items.notes: Stainless steel fastener set (small machine screws + washers). Mfr Xinghui Bailong Stainless Steel. Thread size/count not legible on the label — confirm if needed. Quantity left as entered.

items.name: Miniature Ball Bearings (shielded)
items.notes: Small metal shielded ball bearings, ~10 counted from photo. Exact size (bore/OD) not legible on the label — confirm if needed.

items.name: Machine Bolts with Nuts & Washers (fastener set)
items.notes: Longer machine bolts/screws with hex nuts and washers. Thread size/length not legible on the label. Similar to but distinct from the short Stainless Steel Screws & Washers set (Bag 13). Quantity left as entered.

items.name: SG90 9g Micro Servo
items.notes: SG90-type 9g micro servo with horns + cable. Barcode 000000703345. Different brand/SKU from the Cytron T-8090 — same servo type.

items.name: MG90S Metal-Gear 9g Micro Servo
items.notes: Metal-gear 9g micro servo (MG90S) with horns + cable. Distinct from the plastic-gear SG90/T-8090 — metal gears.

items.name: Tower Pro SG90 9g Micro Servo (blue)
items.notes: Blue Tower Pro SG90 9g micro servo with horns + cable — same product as the existing Cytron T-8090 (which is a rebadged Tower Pro SG90).

items.name: ULN2003 Stepper Motor Driver Board
items.notes: ULN2003 driver board for 28BYJ-48 stepper motor: white 5-pin connector, 4 indicator LEDs, IN1-IN4 inputs. No package label captured; quantity left as entered.

items.name: 28BYJ-48 Stepper Motor (5V)
items.notes: 28BYJ-48 5V DC geared stepper motor (pairs with the ULN2003 driver board). No package label captured; quantity left as entered.

items.name: Small DC Motor (with leads & JST connector)
items.notes: Small DC motor in a black housing (likely a mini gear/geared DC motor) with red/blue leads ending in a small JST connector. Exact model unclear from photo — confirm if needed. Quantity left as entered.

items.name: 9V Battery Snap Connectors (T-type clips)
items.notes: 9V battery snap/clip connectors with red/black leads. ~6 counted from photo (adjust if off). No package label.

items.name: PWM DC Motor Speed Controller (with switch & knob)
items.notes: PWM DC motor speed controller module with heatsink, speed potentiometer knob, on/off switch and screw terminals (Power+/-, Motor+/-). No package label captured; quantity left as entered.

items.name: Jumper Wires (Dupont, male-to-female)
items.notes: Ribbon of multicolored Dupont jumper wires, male-to-female. Count not on a label (typically ~40 per ribbon). Quantity left as entered.

items.name: Battery Holder (AA, with leads)
items.notes: Black plastic AA battery holder with red/black wire leads. Exact cell count not clear from the photo (looks like 3-4x AA) — confirm if needed. Quantity left as entered.

items.name: RP2040-Zero Microcontroller Board (Waveshare)
items.notes: Waveshare RP2040-Zero: RP2040 dual-core MCU board, USB-C, BOOT + RESET buttons, castellated GPIO pins (5V/GND/3V3 + GPxx), onboard RGB LED. Identified from the close-up photo.

items.name: DC Motor (130-type hobby motor)
items.notes: Bare 130-size hobby/toy DC motors (FA-130/RF-130 type), silver can, solder tabs. ~2 shown in photo; quantity (10) as you set it.

items.name: PWM DC Motor Speed Controller (small, no switch)
items.notes: Small PWM DC motor speed controller: green PCB, screw terminals (Power+/-, Motor+/-), speed pot. No heatsink/switch (smaller than the other controller).

items.name: ESP8266 NodeMCU Dev Board w/ OLED (ideaspark)
items.notes: ideaspark ESP8266 (ESP8266MOD/ESP-12F) WiFi dev board with onboard 0.96in OLED, micro-USB, CH340 USB-serial, V2.1.1. No package label captured; quantity left as entered.

items.name: Prototype PCB / Perfboard (double-sided)
items.notes: Double-sided green prototyping board (perfboard) with plated through-holes, ~2x8cm strip. No package label; quantity left as entered.

items.name: Prototype PCB / Perfboard (double-sided, larger square)
items.notes: Double-sided green perfboard, larger square format (~5x7cm) — bigger than the 2x8cm strip already logged.

items.name: Sound Detection Sensor Module (KY-037/038)
items.notes: Microphone sound sensor on red PCB: electret mic, LM393 comparator, sensitivity trim-pot, analog (A0) + digital (D0) outputs. No package label captured; quantity left as entered.

items.name: Digital Voltmeter/Ammeter Panel Meter (DSN-VC288)
items.notes: DSN-VC288 V2.0 combined digital voltmeter + ammeter panel meter (dual display) with calibration trim-pots and connector for the current shunt. No package label captured; quantity left as entered.

items.name: Drone Propellers (foldable, gray)
items.notes: Foldable quadcopter/drone propeller blades (gray). Several in the bag. No package label captured; quantity left as entered.

items.name: Arduino Uno R3 (compatible)
items.notes: Arduino Uno R3 compatible board (blue), USB-B, barrel jack, SMD ATmega328 + CH340 USB-serial. No package label captured; quantity left as entered.

items.name: YD-RP2040 Board (USB-C, 16MB)
items.notes: YD-RP2040 (VCC-GND.COM, Shenzhen Yihua) Raspberry Pi Pico-compatible RP2040 board: USB-C, 16MB flash, BOOT button, castellated + through-hole pins. Distinct from the smaller RP2040-Zero. No package count; quantity left as entered.

items.name: Mini Speaker 8Ω 0.5W
items.notes: Small round loudspeaker driver, marked 8ohm 0.5W MAX, with solder tabs (~40-50mm). No package label captured; quantity left as entered.

items.name: MB102 Breadboard Power Supply Module (3.3V/5V)
items.notes: MB102 breadboard power supply: barrel-jack + USB-A input, selectable 3.3V/5V per rail (5V/OFF/3.3V jumpers), plugs into breadboard power rails. No package label captured; quantity left as entered.

items.name: XY Joystick Module (KY-023, thumbstick)
items.notes: Dual-axis analog thumbstick joystick breakout (KY-023): VRx/VRy analog outputs + push-button (SW), 5 pins (GND/+5V/VRX/VRY/SW). No package label captured; quantity left as entered.

items.name: 1-Channel 5V Relay Module (10A)
items.notes: Single-channel 5V relay breakout (Tongling JQC-3FF-S-Z, 10A 250VAC) with COM/NO/NC screw terminals and VCC/GND/IN control pins. No package label captured; quantity left as entered.

items.name: RFID-RC522 Module (13.56MHz, MFRC522)
items.notes: RFID-RC522 reader/writer module (NXP MFRC522, 13.56MHz), SPI interface, with antenna coil. No package label captured; quantity left as entered.

items.name: Water Level Sensor Module
items.notes: Analog water level / water detection sensor (red PCB, interlocking comb traces, labeled "Water Sensor"), 3 pins (S/+/-). No package label captured; quantity left as entered.

items.name: ULN2003 Stepper Motor Driver Board
items.notes: ULN2003 stepper driver module (label MOC-055, Askelmoottorin ohjainmoduuli ULN2003). Same board already logged.

items.name: TT Gear Motor (yellow, 1:120, DC)
items.notes: Yellow plastic TT DC gear motor (robot-car chassis type), 1:120 ratio, straight single-shaft. Label NAB-113 / Vaihteistomoottori 1:120 suora. No pack count; quantity left as entered.

items.name: RGB LED Module (HW-479 / KY-016)
items.notes: HW-479 (KY-016) full-color RGB LED breakout module. Pins: B, G, R and - (common ground/cathode). Identified from the marking the user read off the board.

items.name: Digital Voltmeter/Ammeter (dual red/blue display)
items.notes: Dual-display digital volt + ammeter panel meter (red V / blue A), 3 thin + 2 thick wires. Looks like the same class as the DSN-VC288 already logged — confirm if identical or a different model.

items.name: Micro Switch / Limit Switch (Omron D2F-L, lever)
items.notes: Omron D2F-L subminiature micro switch (basic limit switch) with hinge lever, marked 1440RAC. SPDT — COM/NO/NC, 3 terminals.

items.name: Slotted Optical Switch / Photo-Interrupter (Vishay TCST1103)
items.notes: Vishay TCST1103 transmissive optical sensor (slotted photo-interrupter), 3.1mm gap, phototransistor output.

items.name: Resistor Assortment (metal film, multiple values)
items.notes: Assortment of metal-film resistors on tape strips, multiple/mixed values (1 bag). Count per value not enumerated.

items.name: Glass Fuse Assortment Kit (5x20mm, 0.5A-20A)
items.notes: Compartment box of 5x20mm glass fuses, ~10 pcs each: 0.5A, 1A, 2A, 3A, 5A, 8A, 10A, 15A, 20A.

items.name: Solder Seal Heat-Shrink Wire Connectors (assortment)
items.notes: Compartment box of waterproof solder-seal heat-shrink butt connectors (red/blue/yellow/white for various wire gauges) plus some heat-shrink tubing.

items.name: PWM DC Motor Speed Controller w/ Digital Display (RPM/%)
items.notes: Panel-mount PWM DC motor speed controller with red LED digital display (RPM / %), knob and on/off switch. Distinct (display version) from the bare-board PWM controllers already logged.

items.name: DC Voltmeter (panel meter, ~100V max)
items.notes: DC panel voltmeter, max ~100V per the carded instructions (multilingual). Corrected from an earlier mis-ID as a piezo buzzer — confirm exact model/range if needed.

items.name: DC Digital Voltmeter (0-100V, blue display)
items.notes: Panel-mount DC digital voltmeter, blue LED 3-digit display, range DC 0-100V (2/3-wire). Voltmeter-only — distinct from the DSN-VC288 volt+ammeter.

items.name: Breadboard Jumper Wire Kit (solid-core, assorted)
items.notes: Box of pre-formed solid-core breadboard jumper wires (U-shaped, assorted lengths/colors) plus some flexible jumpers. Distinct from the Dupont ribbon jumpers.

items.name: Automotive Blade Fuse Assortment (ATC/ATO)
items.notes: Compartment box of automotive blade fuses (ATC/ATO standard), assorted amperage ratings/colors. Distinct from the 5x20mm glass fuse kit.

items.name: DHT11 Temperature & Humidity Sensor Module
items.notes: DHT11 digital temperature + humidity sensor on breakout PCB (blue grille housing), 3-pin (- / out / +).

items.name: Telescopic Antenna (extendable rod)
items.notes: Metal telescopic / extendable rod antenna (e.g. for FM / radio / RF modules).

items.name: USB-C Female Connector / Breakout
items.notes: USB-C female input connector / breakout with solder leads (the wires are its leads, not an antenna). Corrected from an earlier mis-ID as an RF module.

items.name: LED Ring / Halo (small, ~12V) — UNCONFIRMED
items.notes: Small green annular (ring) PCB with SMD parts + a 2-wire lead; markings include 12V / LED. Likely a small 12V LED ring/halo. Exact part not legible — confirm or add a close-up.

items.name: 4-Digit 7-Segment LED Display
items.notes: 4-digit 7-segment LED display module (with decimal points).

items.name: 8x8 LED Dot Matrix Display
items.notes: 8x8 LED dot-matrix display module.
